commit.subject: LU-17194 osc: add cdp_cap_sys_resource
commit.message:
LU-17194 osc: add cdp_cap_sys_resource

Remove another usage of cl_io/osc_io in DIO submit by
adding cap_sys_resource to CDP.

Test-Parameters: forjanitoronly
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Id65ad335f9d070888aaf3bd81d25320a18592c7c
